crime.value: Murder of horse trainer and disappearance of racehorse Silver Blaze
crime.quote: the singular disappearance of the favorite for the Wessex Cup, and the tragic murder of its trainer

victim.value: Horse trainer (killed) and Silver Blaze racehorse (disappeared)
victim.quote: the tragic murder of its trainer

closed_world.value: King's Pyland racing stables and surrounding Dartmoor area

resolution.value: Holmes solves the case through deductive analysis and reveals solution to Watson and Colonel
resolution.quote: I am afraid that my explanation may disillusion you but it has always been my habit to hide none of my methods

investigator.value: Sherlock Holmes as consulting detective, with Dr. Watson as chronicler/companion
investigator.quote: Sherlock Holmes, with his sharp, eager face framed in his ear-flapped travelling-cap

red_herring.value: Letter from Meiringen presented as genuine summons but deliberately recognized as hoax to draw out Moriarty
red_herring.quote: I was quite convinced that the letter from Meiringen was a hoax, and I allowed you to depart on that errand

clue_fairness.value: Holmes demonstrates his methods openly, showing the crumpled paper evidence and explaining his reasoning to all present
clue_fairness.quote: it has always been my habit to hide none of my methods, either from my friend Watson or from any one

social_world.value: Racing establishment with Colonel, trainer-owner dynamics, and criminal organization with numerous agents
social_world.quote: the singular disappearance of the favorite for the Wessex Cup, and the tragic murder of its trainer

reveal_mechanic.value: Physical evidence demonstration using crumpled paper fragment and organized criminal evidence in pigeonhole system
reveal_mechanic.quote: He held up a little crumpled piece of paper. 'The remainder of the sheet!' cried the Inspector.

media_and_audience.value: Case becomes national sensation with extensive newspaper coverage throughout England
media_and_audience.quote: which was the one topic of conversation through the length and breadth of England

investigator_wound.value: Holmes faces career crisis and mortal confrontation, accepting death as congenial conclusion to his work
investigator_wound.quote: my career had in any case reached its crisis, and that no possible conclusion to it could be more congenial

_meta.title: ebook sir arthur conan doyle the memoirs of sherlock holmes
